code: import React from'react';import{FaArrowRight}from'react-icons/fa';import'./FindYear.css';import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{SeasonContext}from'../../context/SeasonContext';import{useContext}from'react';import{toast}from'react-toastify';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const FindYear=()=>{const[year,setYear]=useState(0);const[active,setActive]=useState(false);const{setYearSeason}=useContext(SeasonContext);const navigate=useNavigate();const isLoggedIn=()=>!!localStorage.getItem('token');useEffect(()=>{if(year.length===4&&year>=1950&&year<=2025)return setActive(true);setActive(false);},[year]);const handleChange=e=>{setYear(e.target.value);};const handleClick=e=>{if(!isLoggedIn()){e.preventDefault();toast.warning('Você precisa estar logado para trocar de temporada!',{position:"top-right",autoClose:5000,hideProgressBar:false,closeOnClick:true,pauseOnHover:true,draggable:true});navigate('/login');}else if(year.length===4&&year>=1950&&year<=2025){setYearSeason(year);setYear(0);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"findYearDiv",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Procurar outro ano:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"inputDiv",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:year===0?'':year,onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`sendArrow ${active?'active':''}`,onClick:handleClick,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FaArrowRight,{fill:"white"})})]})]});};export default FindYear;
